title: vicia vicina var. azurea
intro: Vicia vicina var. azurea is a variety of the vetch plant, specifically a type of perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and diarrhea. The plant's health benefits include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. Traditionally, Vicia vicina var. azurea was used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders.
